summary: Iteration 3 — Full backend + frontend regression for the new CMS + Media Storage. All 34 backend pytest cases pass (16 legacy + 18 new content/media). Frontend admin CMS end-to-end verified: login, sidebar nav (9 items), all 7 CMS sections load with correct seeded counts, Rooms edit→save→public /rooms roundtrip works, Settings promoTitle edit→public / homepage roundtrip works, Media upload succeeds and thumbnail renders from /api/media/{id}, Blog list still shows 3 seeded posts. No regressions.

issues: Two 401s from GET /api/auth/me still fire on public pages because AuthProvider mounts globally. Non-blocking; already noted in iteration 1/2.

verification_results.backend_pytest: PASS — 34/34 tests, 6.49s. Includes new: /api/content GET (all + per-type), /api/admin/content PUT auth+validation+roundtrip for rooms & site.promoTitle, /api/admin/media upload (auth, PNG accepted, unsupported ext rejected), /api/media/{id} bytes roundtrip, DELETE /api/admin/media soft-delete.
verification_results.public_content_get: PASS — GET /api/content returns all 7 keys; /api/content/rooms returns Standard Room (IDR 175.000, 3×3 m) + Cottage (IDR 225.000, 5×3,5 m).
verification_results.restaurant_page: PASS — All 5 menu items render (Nasi Goreng, Mie Instan, Sosis Bakar, Kentang Goreng, Kopi Hitam); no 'Reservasi Meja' button present.
verification_results.rooms_page: PASS — Both rooms render with correct prices/sizes, facility pills with icons.
verification_results.admin_login: PASS — admin@pelangihomestay.com / pelangi2026 redirects to /admin/dashboard; httpOnly cookies set (verified in backend pytest).
verification_results.admin_sidebar_nav: PASS — All 9 nav items visible & clickable: admin-nav-blog / rooms / menu / gallery / attractions / faqs / testimonials / media / settings.
verification_results.cms_rooms: PASS — Loaded 2 rooms; expanded Standard Room; changed priceFrom IDR 175.000 → IDR 180.000; PUT returned ok; public /rooms displayed 'IDR 180.000'; then restored to IDR 175.000.
verification_results.cms_attractions_count: PASS — 5 items loaded in correct default order (Pura Ulun Danu, Kebun Raya, Danau Beratan, Pasar Candikuning, Handara Gate).
verification_results.cms_settings_roundtrip: PASS — Fields for brand/email/promoTitle/bookingUrl/seoTitle/restaurantHours all rendered. Changed promoTitle to 'Menginap 5 malam gratis 1 malam'; verified on homepage; restored.
verification_results.cms_media_upload_ui: PASS — Uploader-upload button visible; uploaded a 1×1 PNG via <input type=file>; new thumbnail rendered from /api/media/{id}; media-copy-{id} and media-delete-{id} controls present.
verification_results.blog_regression: PASS — /admin/blog lists 3 seeded posts with Edit/Hapus actions; full CRUD verified in backend_test.py.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py:497 GET /api/media/{id} is public with no cache tampering — good (public + 1yr cache header). Consider adding an ETag header for CDN edge caching later.

server.py:432 PUT /api/admin/content/{type} accepts an arbitrary dict payload. Payload is stored raw so a malformed admin edit could break public pages. Consider Pydantic schemas per content type (or at least type/shape validation) — but frontend has DEFAULT_CONTENT fallback in ContentContext so pages don't crash.
AuthContext still polls /api/auth/me on every public page load, producing 401 console noise for anonymous visitors. Cosmetic (repeat from iter 1).
CmsList.jsx has no explicit 'reorder-up-{id}'/'reorder-down-{id}' test-ids; move buttons only titled 'Naik/Turun'. Consider adding testids for reorder verification.

CmsMedia.jsx: ImageInput onChange fires with a URL after upload but the CmsMedia handler only reloads — after upload the empty URL input stays empty. Acceptable UX but slightly confusing (upload works, only grid refreshes).
CORS is locked to a single FRONTEND_URL env var — good. But note: cookies use samesite=none which only works over HTTPS (fine for k8s ingress but flag for local http:// dev).
seed_data_creation: None. Tests self-cleanup: content roundtrip tests restore the original values; media upload test deletes the uploaded file; a leftover Playwright pytest_tiny.png + one older test.jpg were cleaned up post-test via the API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite: `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v` (2 files, 34 tests, ~6s, all pass). Full CMS is functional end-to-end: seeded 7 content types (rooms/menu/gallery/attractions/faqs/testimonials/site) at first boot, exposed via /api/content*, editable via /api/admin/content/{type} with cookie auth. Emergent object storage init OK on startup; images uploaded via /api/admin/media are served back at /api/media/{id} with correct content-type. No open issues.
rca of the issue: Not applicable — no bugs found this iteration.
